---
title: "UDS_Final_Project"
author: "Gaurav Law"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(xgboost)
library(randomForest)
library(broom)
library(janitor)
library(pROC)
library(reshape2)
library(caret)
library(purrr)
library(fuzzyjoin)
library(tidyr)
library(gt)
library(gtExtras)
library(prismatic)
library(ggrepel)
library(scales)
library(purrr)
library(ggimage)

library(hoopR)
library(ncaahoopR)
library(toRvik)
library(AdvancedBasketballStats)
library(cbbdata)
library(rvest)
library(stringi)
```



```{r}

# Player box stats 2003-2026
player_03_26_load <- hoopR::load_mbb_player_box(seasons = c(2003:2026))

player_03_26 <- player_03_26_load %>%
  filter(!is.nan(minutes) & !is.na(minutes)) %>%
  group_by(athlete_id, team_id, season) %>%
  reframe(athlete_display_name, athlete_position_name, athlete_headshot_href,
          team_location, team_logo,
          across(
            c(minutes:points),
            ~ round(mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
            ),
          games = n()) %>%
  #filter(minutes >= 15 & games >= 19) %>%
  distinct()

```

```{r}

scrape_nba_draft <- function(years) {
  
  scrape_single_year <- function(year) {
    url <- paste0("https://www.basketball-reference.com/draft/NBA_", year, ".html")
    
    tryCatch({
      full_table <- read_html(url)
      
      draft <- full_table %>%
        html_nodes("table") %>%
        .[[1]] %>%
        html_table(fill = TRUE)
      
      # Set first row as column names and remove it
      colnames(draft) <- draft[1, ]
      draft <- draft[-1, ]
      
      # Remove duplicate header rows that appear mid-table
      draft <- draft[draft[[1]] != colnames(draft)[1], ]
      
      # Add year column for reference
      draft$draft_year <- year
      
      message("Successfully scraped ", year, " NBA Draft (", nrow(draft), " rows)")
      return(draft)
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning("Failed to scrape year ", year, ": ", e$message)
      return(NULL)
    })
  }
  
  # Scrape all years and bind into one data frame
  all_drafts <- lapply(years, function(y) {
    Sys.sleep(3)
    scrape_single_year(y)
  })
  
  # Drop any failed years and combine
  all_drafts <- Filter(Negate(is.null), all_drafts)
  combined <- bind_rows(all_drafts)
  
  return(combined)
}

player_03_26 %>%
  filter(athlete_display_name == "Ike Diogu")

all_years <- c(2004:2025)

# Run the scraper
draft_data <- scrape_nba_draft(all_years)


```


```{r}
setdiff(draft_upd$Player, player_03_26$athlete_display_name)
```


```{r}

# Look at case by case data manipulation
draft_upd <- draft_data %>%
  select(Pk, Player, College, draft_year) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~na_if(., "")),
         Season = draft_year,
         Pk = as.integer(Pk),
         Player = stri_trans_general(Player, "Latin-ASCII"),
         Player = case_when(
           Player == "V.J. Edgecombe" ~ "VJ Edgecombe",
           Player == "J.J. Hickson" ~ "JJ Hickson",
           Player == "Patrick Ewing" ~ "Patrick Ewing Jr.",
           Player == "Marcus Morris" ~ "Marcus Morris Sr.",
           Player == "Jeff Taylor" ~ "Jeffery Taylor",
           Player == "Robbie Hummel" ~ "Robbie John Hummel",
           Player == "K.J. McDaniels" ~ "KJ McDaniels",
           Player == "R.J. Hunter" ~ "RJ Hunter",
           Player == "A.J. Hammons" ~ "AJ Hammons",
           Player == "Harry Giles" ~ "Harry Giles III",
           Player == "Wade Baldwin" ~ "Wade Baldwin IV",
           Player == "Kevin Knox" ~ "Kevin Knox II",
           Player == "Vince Edwards" ~ "Vincent Edwards",
           Player == "Tristan Da Silva" ~ "Tristan da Silva",
           Player == "DaRon Holmes" ~ "DaRon Holmes II",
           Player == "Egor Dёmin" ~ "Egor Demin",
           TRUE ~ Player
         )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Player),
         !is.na(Pk),
         !is.na(College),
         Player != "Player") %>%
  select(-draft_year)

player_03_26 <- player_03_26 %>%
  mutate(athlete_display_name = case_when(
    athlete_display_name == "Robbie John Hummel" ~ "Robbie Hummel",
    athlete_display_name == "Pierre Deshawn Jackson" ~ "Pierre Jackson",
    athlete_display_name == "Erik Jay Murphy" ~ "Erik Murphy",
    athlete_display_name == "Johnny O'Bryant III" ~ "Johnny O'Bryant",
    athlete_display_name == "O.G. Anunoby" ~ "OG Anunoby",
    athlete_display_name == "Xavier Tillman" ~ "Xavier Tillman Sr.",
    athlete_display_name == "GG Jackson" ~ "GG Jackson II",
    athlete_display_name == "Carlton Carrington" ~ "Bub Carrington",
    TRUE ~ athlete_display_name
  ))


```

```{r}
draft_full <- draft_upd %>%
  left_join(player_03_26, by = c(Player = "athlete_display_name", Season = "season"))

draft_full <- draft_full %>%
  filter(!is.na(minutes))
```



```{r bind rows 2026}

# # Combine with 2026 players' data
# player_26 <- load_mbb_player_box(seasons = 2026) %>%
#   group_by(athlete_id) %>%
#   reframe(athlete_display_name, team_location,
#     round(across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
#     games = n()) %>%
#   distinct() %>%
#   mutate(impact = 0) %>%
#   filter(minutes >= 15 & games >= 14) %>%
#   select(-c(opponent_team_id, opponent_team_score, team_score, team_id,
#             athlete_id, game_id, season_type, fouls)) %>%
#   rename("player" = "athlete_display_name",
#          "Season" = "season")

```


```{r}
# Impact factor: Calculated by Gaurav Law (have used in multiple projects for MCBB + WCBB)
# Used AI to help with function but formula has been used many times
calculate_season_impact <- function(data) {
  data %>%
    group_by(Season) %>% 
    mutate(
      `net rtg` = ortg - drtg
    ) %>%
    drop_na(`net rtg`, usg, mpg) %>%
    mutate(
      # Net Rating Standardization
      mean_rtg = mean(`net rtg`),
      sd_rtg = sd(`net rtg`),
      net_std = round((`net rtg` - mean_rtg) / sd_rtg, 2),
      
      # Minutes Standardization 
      min_sd = sd(mpg),
      min_std = round(mpg / min_sd, 2),
      
      # Combined Net * Min Score
      raw_net_min = net_std * min_std,
      max_raw_net_min = max(raw_net_min, na.rm = TRUE),
      net_min_std = round(raw_net_min / max_raw_net_min, 2),
      
      # PER Standardization
      pfr_mpg = pfr * mpg,
      mean_per = mean(pfr_mpg),
      sd_per = sd(pfr_mpg),
      per_std = round((pfr_mpg - mean_per) / sd_per, 2)
    ) %>%
    
    # Impact Score Calculation (max = 25 per season)
    mutate(
      term_1 = net_min_std - min(net_min_std, na.rm = TRUE),
      term_2 = per_std - min(per_std, na.rm = TRUE),
      raw_impact_score = usg * term_1 * term_2,
      max_season_impact = max(raw_impact_score, na.rm = TRUE),
      impact = round(raw_impact_score / (max_season_impact / 25), 3)
    ) %>%
    
    # Filter for eligible players
    filter(mpg >= 15 & g >= 19) %>%
    mutate(
      fgm = round(fgm / g, 1),
      ftm = round(ftm / g, 1),
      fta = round(fta / g, 1),
      three_m = round(three_m / g, 1),
      three_a = round(three_a / g, 1)
    ) %>%
    select(-mean_rtg, -sd_rtg, -min_sd, -mean_per, -sd_per, 
           -term_1, -term_2, -raw_net_min, -max_raw_net_min, 
           -raw_impact_score, -max_season_impact) %>%
    
    ungroup()
}

cbb_ovr <- calculate_season_impact(cbb_player)

cbb_ovr <- cbb_ovr %>%
  left_join(player_03_26, by = c(player = "athlete_display_name", Season = "season")) %>%
  select(player, Season, team_location, minutes, points, rebounds, assists, blocks, steals,
         offensive_rebounds, defensive_rebounds, turnovers, field_goals_made, field_goals_attempted,
         free_throws_made, free_throws_attempted, three_point_field_goals_made,
         three_point_field_goals_attempted, games, impact, pick) %>%
  bind_rows(player_26)

```

# Predict impact for 2026

```{r}
target <- "impact"

exclude_vars <- c("player",
                  "Season",
                  "team_location",
                  "pick",
                  target)

features <- setdiff(names(cbb_ovr), exclude_vars)
```


```{r xgb model predicting impact}

training <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season < 2026) %>% ungroup()
testing <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season == 2026) %>% ungroup()

set.seed(123)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(training[, features]), 
                      label = training[[target]])
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(testing[, features]), 
                      label = testing[[target]])

# Train the model
xgb_model <- xgboost(
  data = dtrain,
  objective = "reg:squarederror",
  nrounds = 100,
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4,
  verbose = 0
)

# Calculate our impact predictions
testing$impact <- predict(xgb_model, newdata = dtest)

testing <- testing %>%
  mutate(impact = round(impact, 3)) %>%
  arrange(-impact)


```

## Backtesting for impact score (GREAT!!)
### DO NOT RUN BEFORE "NBA Draft projections"

```{r 2025}

training <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season < 2025) %>% ungroup()
testing <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season == 2025) %>% ungroup()

set.seed(123)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(training[, features]), 
                      label = training[[target]])
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(testing[, features]), 
                      label = testing[[target]])

# Train the model
xgb_model <- xgboost(
  data = dtrain,
  objective = "reg:squarederror",
  nrounds = 100,
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4,
  verbose = 0
)

# Calculate our transfer predictions
testing$preds <- predict(xgb_model, newdata = dtest)

# Calculate RMSE
actuals <- testing[[target]]

# Find RMSE of our test set
rmse_xg <- sqrt(mean((testing$preds - actuals)^2))

testing <- testing %>%
  select(player, team_location, Season, preds, impact)


cat("RMSE:", round(rmse_xg, 4))
```

```{r 2023}

training <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season < 2023) %>% ungroup()
testing <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season == 2023) %>% ungroup()

set.seed(123)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(training[, features]), 
                      label = training[[target]])
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(testing[, features]), 
                      label = testing[[target]])

# Train the model
xgb_model <- xgboost(
  data = dtrain,
  objective = "reg:squarederror",
  nrounds = 100,
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4,
  verbose = 0
)

# Calculate our transfer predictions
testing$preds <- predict(xgb_model, newdata = dtest)

# Calculate RMSE
actuals <- testing[[target]]

# Find RMSE of our test set
rmse_xg <- sqrt(mean((testing$preds - actuals)^2))

testing <- testing %>%
  select(player, team_location, Season, preds, impact)


cat("RMSE:", round(rmse_xg, 4))
```

```{r 2022}

training <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season < 2022) %>% ungroup()
testing <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season == 2022) %>% ungroup()

set.seed(123)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(training[, features]), 
                      label = training[[target]])
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(testing[, features]), 
                      label = testing[[target]])

# Train the model
xgb_model <- xgboost(
  data = dtrain,
  objective = "reg:squarederror",
  nrounds = 100,
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4,
  verbose = 0
)

# Calculate our transfer predictions
testing$preds <- predict(xgb_model, newdata = dtest)

# Calculate RMSE
actuals <- testing[[target]]

# Find RMSE of our test set
rmse_xg <- sqrt(mean((testing$preds - actuals)^2))

testing <- testing %>%
  select(player, team_location, Season, preds, impact)


cat("RMSE:", round(rmse_xg, 4))
```

```{r 2021}

training <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season < 2021) %>% ungroup()
testing <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season == 2021) %>% ungroup()

set.seed(123)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(training[, features]), 
                      label = training[[target]])
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(testing[, features]), 
                      label = testing[[target]])

# Train the model
xgb_model <- xgboost(
  data = dtrain,
  objective = "reg:squarederror",
  nrounds = 100,
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4,
  verbose = 0
)

# Calculate our transfer predictions
testing$preds <- predict(xgb_model, newdata = dtest)

# Calculate RMSE
actuals <- testing[[target]]

# Find RMSE of our test set
rmse_xg <- sqrt(mean((testing$preds - actuals)^2))

testing <- testing %>%
  select(player, team_location, Season, preds, impact)


cat("RMSE:", round(rmse_xg, 4))
```



# NBA Draft projections

```{r NBA Draft projections}

conf <- read_csv("~/Desktop/Data Testing/Pacers Project/conferences.csv") %>%
  filter(Season == 2025 & Division == "D1") %>%
  select(Team, Conference)

testing <- testing %>%
  left_join(conf, by = c(team_location = "Team")) %>%
  mutate(impact = case_when(Conference %in% c("SEC", "ACC", "Big 12", "Big Ten", "Big East") ~
                              impact + 0.1*impact,
                            .default = impact)) %>%
  arrange(-impact) %>%
  select(-Conference)

# Scraped NBA draft projections, per NBADraft.net
proj_picks_draft <- read_csv("~/Desktop/Data Testing/Pacers Project/pred_picks.csv") %>%
  select(-c(...1, Team)) %>%
  filter(Pick <= 60)

testing <- testing %>%
  select(-pick) %>%
  stringdist_left_join(
    proj_picks_draft,
    by = c(player = "Player", team_location = "School"),
    method = "jw",
    max_dist = 0.15,
    distance_col = "dist"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Pick)) %>%
  select(-c(Player, School, player.dist, team_location.dist, dist)) %>%
  rename("pick" = "Pick") %>%
  arrange(pick)


cbb_ovr <- cbb_ovr %>%
  filter(!player %in% c(proj_picks_draft$Player)) %>%
  bind_rows(testing)

darko <- read_csv("~/Desktop/Data Testing/Pacers Project/darko_history.csv")
darko_top_300 <- darko %>%
  filter(dpm_rank <= 300 & season >= 2000) %>%
  group_by(player_name) %>%
  reframe(dpm = round(mean(dpm), 2),
          dpm_rank = round(mean(dpm_rank), 2)) %>%
  arrange(-dpm)

projections <- cbb_ovr %>%
  left_join(darko_top_300, by = c(player = "player_name")) %>%
  #filter(!is.na(pick)) %>%
  filter((!is.na(dpm) | (player %in% proj_picks_draft$Player)) & !is.na(pick)) %>%
  mutate(dpm = ifelse(!is.na(dpm), dpm, 0)) %>%
  group_by(player, pick, dpm) %>%
  reframe(across(
            c(minutes:impact),
            ~ round(mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
            )) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(pick, -dpm)



```


```{r}
target <- "dpm"

exclude_vars <- c("player",
                  "impact",
                  target)

features <- setdiff(names(projections), exclude_vars)
```



```{r}
training <- projections %>% 
  filter(dpm != 0 | player %in% c("Kris Dunn", "Miles Bridges")) %>% 
  ungroup()
testing <- projections %>% 
  filter(dpm == 0 & (!player %in% c("Kris Dunn",
                                       "Miles Bridges",
                                       "Bobby Portis"))) %>% 
  ungroup()

set.seed(123)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(training[, features]), 
                      label = training[[target]])
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(testing[, features]), 
                      label = testing[[target]])

# Train the model
xgb_model <- xgboost(
  data = dtrain,
  objective = "reg:squarederror",
  nrounds = 100,
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4,
  verbose = 0
)

# Calculate our transfer predictions
testing$dpm <- predict(xgb_model, newdata = dtest)

testing <- testing %>%
  mutate(pick_factor = 0.2*pick + abs(0.8*dpm - 0.2*impact)) %>%
  reframe(player, dpm, impact, pick_factor) %>%
  arrange(pick_factor) %>%
  mutate(proj_pick = 1:n())

logos <- load_mbb_player_box(seasons = 2026) %>%
  select(athlete_display_name, athlete_headshot_href, team_logo)

testing <- testing %>%
  left_join(logos, by = c(player = "athlete_display_name")) %>%
  distinct()

sort_data <- testing %>%
  select(proj_pick, player, athlete_headshot_href, team_logo, pick_factor, dpm, impact) %>%
  mutate(athlete_headshot_href = ifelse(is.na(athlete_headshot_href), team_logo, athlete_headshot_href),
         pick_factor = round(pick_factor, 3),
         dpm = round(dpm, 3),
         impact = round(impact, 3))

sort_gt <- sort_data %>%
  gt(id = "sorted_gt") %>%
  text_transform(locations = cells_body(c(athlete_headshot_href, team_logo)),
    fn = function(x) {
      web_image(
        url = x,
        height = 50
      )
    }) %>%
  cols_align(align = "center") %>%
           cols_label(player = "Player",
                      athlete_headshot_href = "",
                      team_logo = "Team",
                      proj_pick = "Proj. Pick",
                      pick_factor = "DPM + Impact Score",
                      impact = "Impact Score",
                      dpm = "DARKO DPM") %>%
  tab_header(title = "Pacers Projected Top Pick",
             subtitle = "2026 Draft") %>%
  gtExtras::gt_theme_espn() %>%
  data_color(columns = c(dpm, impact),
             palette = c("darkred", "red", "indianred", "white", "steelblue", "blue", "darkblue"))

sort_gt




```
